title: Viral Meme Caption
prompt: Generate a funny, relatable meme caption for [TOPIC]. It should work as top/bottom text on a classic meme template. Keep it punchy — under 10 words per line. Make it shareable and universally funny.

title: Drake Format Ideas
prompt: Give me 5 Drake meme ideas about [TOPIC]. Format: Top panel (rejecting): [thing people do wrong]. Bottom panel (approving): [better alternative]. Keep each panel under 8 words.

title: Expanding Brain Levels
prompt: Create an Expanding Brain meme about [TOPIC] with 4 levels going from basic to galaxy brain. Level 1: Normal take. Level 2: Slightly better. Level 3: Big brain move. Level 4: Absurdly overthought genius take.

title: Workplace Humor
prompt: Write a relatable workplace meme caption about [SITUATION]. It should resonate with anyone who's worked in an office or on a team. Use the [TEMPLATE] meme format. Keep it clean but painfully accurate.

title: Developer Meme
prompt: Create a developer/programmer meme about [TOPIC]. Reference common dev frustrations like: debugging, production bugs, code reviews, legacy code, or 'it works on my machine'. Format for top/bottom text overlay.

title: Change My Mind Hot Takes
prompt: Give me 5 'Change My Mind' meme ideas about [TOPIC]. Each should be a mildly controversial but funny hot take that people will want to debate. Keep each one under 12 words.
